delta.text: The device is locked in AOD/keyguard mode and c

annot be unlocked through touch gestures. Cannot proceed with VLC task.

{
unlock attempts and taps did not wake/unlock the screen, so
VLC could not be opened or interacted with.", "screenshot_
paths": ["AOD lock screen with faded time dig
its, no VLC UI ever shown"], "failure_reason": "Device
is locked on the keyguard/AOD screen and no swipe or tap input
dismisses the lock; without ability to wake or auth
enticate, VLC cannot be opened to create playlists."}

content.text:
